final:
module top_module(
    input clk, reset, enable,
    output reg [3:0] q
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if(reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if(enable) begin
        q <= q + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
